_comment: Fingerprint for the workspaceTabObject failure trace pattern. Asserts that trace-inspect.js still recognizes the dead-end click signature (pointerdown/up >= 3, click = 0) on the disabled tab. If this stops matching, either the synthetic trace was edited without updating this fingerprint, or trace-inspect.js's detection regressed.
rationale: This fingerprint locks in the failure-trace shape that motivated the wave-1 tooling. If a future change makes trace-inspect.js stop reporting dead-end clicks on this fixture, that's a regression in our diagnostic ability, not a bug in the trace.
